rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 2/10 score and rest on the same substantive reasoning: the candidate is a strong senior software engineer but lacks SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, AI accelerator, and deep-learning workload experience required for the role. The differences are pure rewording and ordinary run-to-run variation (e.g. the variant phrases a strength as 'initiative and leadership through founding projects' while listing the same underlying experience). Nothing in the variant keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Aisha Okonkwo.
